emails.subject: Late Feedback
emails.body: Late Feedback Shelley This has been on my 'to do' list for a while, but wanted you to know formally that I very much enjoyed and appreciated your presentation at the ETS Operations Directors Conference. It is imperative Operations and Gas Logistics work together and stay aligned in critical objectives. You continue to demonstrate why you are respected within the leadership ranks. Thanks! Mike Nelson VP ETS Pipeline Integrity Program Management 713 345 5241

emails.subject: Re: Late Feedback
emails.body: Re: Late Feedback Thanks I needed that today! Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: RE: Late Feedback
emails.body: RE: Late Feedback I guess timing is everything, or close to it. Best wishes for the rest of the weekend. To: Nelson, Mike
